$defs.description: Named spec lists to be referred to with $name in the specs section of environments

items.description: Named definition entry containing a named spec list and optional conditional 'when' clause

when.description: Python code condition evaluated as boolean. Specs are appended to the named list only if the condition is True. Available variables: platform, os, target, arch, arch_str, re, env, hostname

additionalProperties.description: List of specs to include in the environment, supporting both simple specs and matrix configurations

anyOf.description: Matrix configuration for generating multiple specs from combinations of constraints

matrix.description: List of spec constraint lists whose cross product generates multiple specs

items.description: List of spec constraints for this matrix dimension

exclude.description: List of specific spec combinations to exclude from the matrix
